channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Blue Origin launches an all-female celebrity crew with Katy Perry, Gayle King and Lauren Sanchez
item.description: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin launched his fiancee Lauren Sanchez into space Monday with an all-female celebrity crew that included Katy Perry and Gayle King.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Suspect in arson at Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro's residence planned to beat him, documents say
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — A man who authorities said scaled an iron security fence in the middle of the night, eluded police and broke into the Pennsylvania governor’s mansion where he set a fire had planned to beat Gov.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wall Street joins global rally after Trump exempts some electronics from tariffs
item.description: Wall Street was poised to add to last week's gains when markets open on Monday as investors juggle incoming corporate earnings along with possible tariff updates from the U.S. and its trading partners.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 2022 NCAA woman of the year, family members killed in upstate New York plane crash
item.description: A private plane that crashed in upstate New York over the weekend was carrying six members of a close-knit family of physicians and distinguished student-athletes on a trip to the Catskills for a birthday celebration and the Passover holiday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Suspect arsonist was prepared to attack Pennsylvania Gov. Shapiro with hammer, court docs reveal
item.description: Court documents concerning Cody Balmer, the man charged in connection with a fire at Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro's residence, have revealed details of the suspect's alleged plot.
item.dc:creator: Brady Doran, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suspected US airstrikes kill at least 7 people in Yemen, Houthi rebels say
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Suspected U.S. airstrikes around Yemen's rebel-held capital killed at least seven people and wounded 29 overnight, the Houthis said Monday as they also claimed shooting down another American MQ-9 Reaper drone.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Plans to celebrate America's 250th anniversary were underway. Then came the federal funding cuts
item.description: Leaders of state humanities councils throughout the country say federal funding cuts by President Donald Trump's administration will force them to scale back or eliminate celebrations next year commemorating the nation's 250th anniversary.
item.dc:creator: Claire Rush And Gary Fields, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: American drivers warned about red flags to avoid ‘predatory towing’ targeting motorists across US
item.description: Officials are warning drivers to be vigilant and aware of a growing trend of tow truck companies scamming people who were involved in car collisions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Retrial opens for Sarah Palin's libel suit against The New York Times
item.description: A retrial is set to begin for Sarah Palin's lawsuit accusing The New York Times of libeling her in an editorial eight years ago.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Suspect arrested in arson fire that forced Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro, family to flee residence
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — A man scaled an iron security fence in the middle of the night, eluded police and broke into the Pennsylvania governor’s mansion where he set a fire that left significant damage and forced Gov.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: FAA says company whose sightseeing chopper crashed, killing 6, is ceasing operations immediately
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Federal Aviation Administration said Sunday that the helicopter tour company whose sightseeing chopper broke apart in flight and crashed in New York, killing the pilot and a family of five visitors from Spain, is shutting down operations immediately.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 6 injured after explosion, house collapse in Austin
item.description: One house was "leveled" while another "suffered severe collapse damage" following an explosion in Austin on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, Fox 5

item.title: US still won't say whether it will return mistakenly deported man, despite Supreme Court decision
item.description: The Trump administration is doubling down on its decision not to tell a federal court whether it has any plans to repatriate a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported last month and remains confined in a notorious prison in El Salvador, despite a Supreme Court ruling and lower court order that the
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 cases of rare brain disease reported in Oregon
item.description: Three cases of a rare brain disease have been reported by public health officials in Hood River County.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Flanigan, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Search continues for Las Vegas veterinarian who apologized for kicking horse
item.description: Dr. Shawn Frehner, 56, was last seen around 9 a.m. on Sunday, April 6, entering the Lake Mead Recreation Area through the Boulder entrance.
item.dc:creator: Madina Ansary, NewsNation

item.title: Nicky Katt of 'Dazed and Confused,' 'Boston Public' dead at 54
item.description: Nicky Katt, who was known for his roles in "Dazed and Confused" and "Boiler Room," has died, according to multiple reports. He was 54 years old.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: A beloved pet tortoise is reunited with its family weeks after disappearing in a Mississippi tornado
item.description: KOKOMO, Miss. (AP) — Myrtle, a cherished pet tortoise, has been reunited with its family in Mississippi weeks after disappearing during a deadly tornado outbreak in March. “He’s been through a lot,” said Myrtle's grateful owner, Tiffany Emanuel.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIE BATES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Search continues for Las Vegas veterinarian who apologized for kicking horse
item.description: Earlier this month, Dr. Frehner apologized for kicking a horse he was hired to give shots to. Days later, he was reported missing in the Lake Mead Recreation Area.
item.dc:creator: Madina Ansary, KRON4

item.title: Trump 'fully fit' to serve as commander in chief, his doctor says after recent physical
item.description: In a report released Sunday, the doctor said in a summary that Trump is “fully fit to execute the duties of Commander-in-Chief and Head of State.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fire at Pennsylvania Governor's Residence was 'act of arson': State Police
item.description: Police said Governor Josh Shapiro and his family were able to safely evacuate after a fire — believed to be an "act of arson" — broke out at the Harrisburg mansion.
item.dc:creator: Hayden Sherry, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nicky Katt of 'Dazed and Confused,' 'Boston Public' dies: reports
item.description: Nicky Katt, who was known for his roles in "Dazed and Confused" and "Boiler Room," has died, according to multiple reports. He was 54 years old.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Takeaways from AP's report on how flat funding set stage for Texas measles outbreak, might fuel more
item.description: The measles outbreak in West Texas didn’t happen just by chance. The easily preventable disease, declared eliminated in the U.S. in 2000, ripped through Texas communities in part because health departments were starved of the funding needed to run vaccine programs, officials say.
item.dc:creator: LAURA UNGAR, MICHELLE R. SMITH and DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Understanding mutual funds: A beginner's guide to investing
item.description: Despite recent stock market slumps and fears in the investment world, it's never a bad time to learn about strategies to boost your investing experience.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, KRON4

item.title: Arizona recreation area closed after hiker death and nearly 3 dozen rescues in just 2 days
item.description: Arizona’s Lake Mead National Recreation Area have closed multiple trails due to dangerously high temperatures and the death of one hiker and rescue of 33 others over two days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wisconsin teen charged in shooting death of mother, stepfather found decomposed in their home
item.description: A 17-year-old Wisconsin boy is accused of killing his parents and leaving their bodies to rot in their home for weeks before fleeing the state in their SUV.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: One of Deserae Turner's last wishes comes true as family, friends hold small horse show in her honor
item.description: On Saturday, April 12, family and friends made one of Deserae Turner's last wishes come true as she participated in a small horse show.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Make-A-Wish grants Masters trip to teen cancer survivor
item.description: Lucas Pacheco, a 18-year-old lymphoma survivor, fulfilled his dream of attending The Masters through the 'Make-A-Wish' Foundation, which granted wishes to children with life-threatening illnesses.
item.dc:creator: Barclay Bishop, Fox 5

item.title: Masters patrons rediscover the joy of old-school communication
item.description: The Masters golf tournament is unique in that it does not allow cell phones, providing a chance to make free calls to anywhere in the world, and allows for a break from the outside world
item.dc:creator: Brad Means, Fox 5

item.title: Trump exempts phones, computers, other electronics from reciprocal tariffs
item.description: The Trump administration is exempting electronics such as phones, computers and other electronics from the "reciprocal" tariffs imposed on other nations, including China.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump says he would respect Supreme Court decision to return wrongly deported man
item.description: President Trump said Friday he would respect a Supreme Court decision to bring back a Maryland man the administration mistakenly deported to El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Social Security Administration 'will be using X to communicate' moving forward
item.description: The shift comes as communications staff at the agency has dwindled due to reassignments in front-facing roles at field offices across the country.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Judge will decide whether to proceed with Menendez brothers resentencing hearing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A judge was set to decide Friday whether to proceed with resentencing hearings for Erik and Lyle Menendez, who were convicted of murdering their parents, in light of Los Angeles' new district attorney opposing their release after 30 years behind bars.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Here's a look at recent aircraft tragedies, mishaps and close calls
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six people were killed Thursday in the latest string of aviation disasters after a sightseeing helicopter broke apart and crashed into the Hudson River between New York City and New Jersey. The crash comes at a time of heightened scrutiny of aircraft collisions and near-misses.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Could Trump's tariffs slow emissions? Sure, experts say, but at great cost overall
item.description: President Donald Trump’s sweeping global tariffs have stirred widespread anxiety about a severe economic downturn -- and curiosity, for some, about how it might affect the world’s warming climate.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amateur golfer urinates in creek at Masters Tournament, gets round of applause
item.description: U.S. Amateur champion Jose Luis Ballester had to take a different kind of relief Thursday at the Masters, just not the kind found in the Rules of Golf.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
